Shopify is an all-in-one commerce platform built for independent business owners to start, run, and grow their businesses online, in-store, and everywhere in between. Here are just few things you can do with Shopify: - Create and customize an online store - Sell in multiple places, including web, mobile, social media, and brick-and-mortar - Manage products, inventory, payments, and shipping - Create, execute, and analyze online marketing campaigns How much does Shopify cost? You can try Shopify free for 3 days, no credit card required. After your trial expires,

shipping - Create, execute, and analyze online marketing campaigns How much does Shopify cost? You can try Shopify free for 3 days, no credit card required. After your trial expires, choose a plan that suits the size and stage of your business. How long are your contracts? Most Shopify plans are month to month unless you sign up for a yearly plan. Shopify Plus is available on 1- or 3-year terms. Can I cancel my account at any time? Yes, if you ever decide that Shopify isn't the best ecommerce platform for your business, simply cancel your account. If you choose a 1- or 3-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can cancel when your term commitment expires. Can I change my

platform for your business, simply cancel your account. If you choose a 1- or 3-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can cancel when your term commitment expires. Can I change my plan later on? On most Shopify plans, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. If you choose a 1-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can upgrade to a 3-year subscription at any time. For both 1- and 3-year subscriptions to Shopify Plus, you can downgrade when your term commitment expires. Do you offer any discounts? We offer a 25% discount for yearly subscriptions if you choose the Basic, Grow, or Advanced plans. If you choose a 3-year Shopify Plus plan, we offer a monthly discount and lower online

25% discount for yearly subscriptions if you choose the Basic, Grow, or Advanced plans. If you choose a 3-year Shopify Plus plan, we offer a monthly discount and lower online variable platform fees. In what countries can I use Shopify? You can use Shopify in nearly every country in the world. Is Shopify PCI Compliant or PCI Certified? Yes, Shopify is certified Level 1 PCI DSS compliant. This means all your data and customer information is ultra secure. Payment questions Are there third-party transaction fees? A third-party payment provider (also called a payment processor or payment gateway) allows you to accept payments online. Learn more about supported third-party payment providers. Are there any credit card fees? Shopify charges a small fee to allow you to accept major credit cards, such as Visa and Mastercard, as payment in your store. setup questions Is there a setup fee? No, there are no setup fees on any of our plans. I'm looking to switch to Shopify. How do I get my data over? If you already have an ecommerce website or are using a different ecommerce platform for your business, you can use the Store Importer app to import your products, customers, and orders data to Shopify. Shopify is an all-in-one commerce platform built for independent business owners to start, run, and grow their businesses online, in-store, and everywhere in between. Here are just few things you can do with Shopify: - Create and customize an online store - Sell in multiple places, including web, mobile, social media, and brick-and-mortar - Manage products, inventory, payments, and shipping - Create, execute, and analyze online marketing campaigns How much does Shopify cost? You can try Shopify free for 3 days, no credit card required. After your trial expires, choose

- Create, execute, and analyze online marketing campaigns How much does Shopify cost? You can try Shopify free for 3 days, no credit card required. After your trial expires, choose a plan that suits the size and stage of your business. How long are your contracts? Most Shopify plans are month to month unless you sign up for a yearly plan. Shopify Plus is available on 1- or 3-year terms. Can I cancel my account at any time? Yes, if you ever decide that Shopify isn't the best ecommerce platform for your business, simply cancel your account. If you choose a 1- or 3-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can cancel when your term commitment expires. Can I change my plan

for your business, simply cancel your account. If you choose a 1- or 3-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can cancel when your term commitment expires. Can I change my plan later on? On most Shopify plans, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. If you choose a 1-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can upgrade to a 3-year subscription at any time. For both 1- and 3-year subscriptions to Shopify Plus, you can downgrade when your term commitment expires. Do you offer any discounts? We offer a 25% discount for yearly subscriptions if you choose the Basic, Grow, or Advanced plans. If you choose a 3-year Shopify Plus plan, we offer a monthly discount and lower online variable

discount for yearly subscriptions if you choose the Basic, Grow, or Advanced plans. If you choose a 3-year Shopify Plus plan, we offer a monthly discount and lower online variable platform fees. In what countries can I use Shopify? You can use Shopify in nearly every country in the world. Is Shopify PCI Compliant or PCI Certified? Yes, Shopify is certified Level 1 PCI DSS compliant. This means all your data and customer information is ultra secure. Payment questions Are there third-party transaction fees? Third-party transaction fees apply if you use a third-party payment provider: for the Basic plan, for the Grow plan, and for the Advanced plan What is a third-party payment provider? use a third-party payment provider: for the Basic plan, for the Grow plan, and for the Advanced plan What is a third-party payment provider? A third-party payment provider (also called a payment processor or payment gateway) allows you to accept payments online. Learn more about supported third-party payment providers. Are there any credit card fees? Shopify charges a small fee to allow you to accept major credit cards, such as Visa and Mastercard, as payment in your store. These fees vary depending on the plan that you choose. Store setup questions Is there a setup fee? No, there are no setup fees on any of our plans. I'm looking to switch to Shopify. questions Is there a setup fee? No, there are no setup fees on any of our plans. I'm looking to switch to Shopify. How do I get my data over? If you already have an ecommerce website or are using a different ecommerce platform for your business, you can use the Store Importer app to import your products, customers, and orders data to Shopify. Can I use my own domain name with Shopify? Yes, you can purchase a domain name within Shopify, or use an existing one that you own. We also provide a forever free myshopify.com domain name to all stores when they sign up. Do I get free web hosting when I open an online store? Yes, Shopify

All Shopify plans include unlimited bandwidth for free. POS What is Shopify POS? Shopify POS is a point of sale app that you can use to sell your products in person. Yes, your Shopify online store automatically synchronizes with Shopify POS, and you manage your entire business from one dashboard. Shopify is an all-in-one commerce platform built for independent business owners to start, run, and grow their businesses online, in-store, and everywhere in between. Here are just few things you can do with Shopify: - Create and customize an online store - Sell in multiple places, including web, mobile, social media, and brick-and-mortar - Manage products, inventory, payments, and shipping - Create, execute, and analyze online marketing campaigns How much does Shopify cost? After your trial expires, choose a plan that suits the size and stage of your business. How long are your contracts? Most Shopify plans are month to month unless you sign up for a yearly plan. Shopify Plus is available on 1- or 3-year terms. Can I cancel my account at any time? Yes, if you ever decide that Shopify isn't the best ecommerce platform for your business, simply cancel your account. Shopify is an all-in-one commerce platform built for independent business owners to start, run, and grow their businesses online, in-store, and everywhere in between. Here are just few things you can do with Shopify: - Create and customize an online store - Sell in multiple places, including web, mobile, social media, and brick-and-mortar - Manage products, inventory, payments, and shipping - Create, execute, and analyze online marketing campaigns How much does Shopify cost? You can try Shopify free for 3 days, no credit card required. After your trial expires, choose

- Create, execute, and analyze online marketing campaigns How much does Shopify cost? You can try Shopify free for 3 days, no credit card required. After your trial expires, choose a plan that suits the size and stage of your business. How long are your contracts? Most Shopify plans are month to month unless you sign up for a yearly plan. Shopify Plus is available on 1- or 3-year terms. Can I cancel my account at any time? Yes, if you ever decide that Shopify isn't the best ecommerce platform for your business, simply cancel your account. If you choose a 1- or 3-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can cancel when your term commitment expires. Can I change my plan

for your business, simply cancel your account. If you choose a 1- or 3-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can cancel when your term commitment expires. Can I change my plan later on? On most Shopify plans, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. If you choose a 1-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can upgrade to a 3-year subscription at any time. For both 1- and 3-year subscriptions to Shopify Plus, you can downgrade when your term commitment expires. Do you offer any discounts? We offer a 25% discount for yearly subscriptions if you choose the Basic, Grow, or Advanced plans. If you choose a 3-year Shopify Plus plan, we offer a monthly discount and lower online variable

discount for yearly subscriptions if you choose the Basic, Grow, or Advanced plans. If you choose a 3-year Shopify Plus plan, we offer a monthly discount and lower online variable platform fees. In what countries can I use Shopify? You can use Shopify in nearly every country in the world. Is Shopify PCI Compliant or PCI Certified? Yes, Shopify is certified Level 1 PCI DSS compliant. This means all your data and customer information is ultra secure. Payment questions Are there third-party transaction fees? Third-party transaction fees apply if you use a third-party payment provider: for the Basic plan, for the Grow plan, and for the Advanced plan What is a third-party payment provider? use a third-party payment provider: for the Basic plan, for the Grow plan, and for the Advanced plan What is a third-party payment provider? A third-party payment provider (also called a payment processor or payment gateway) allows you to accept payments online. Learn more about supported third-party payment providers. Are there any credit card fees? Shopify charges a small fee to allow you to accept major credit cards, such as Visa and Mastercard, as payment in your store. These fees vary depending on the plan that you choose. Store setup questions Is there a setup fee? No, there are no setup fees on any of our plans. I'm looking to switch to Shopify. questions Is there a setup fee? No, there are no setup fees on any of our plans. I'm looking to switch to Shopify. How do I get my data over? If you already have an ecommerce website or are using a different ecommerce platform for your business, you can use the Store Importer app to import your products, customers, and orders data to Shopify. Can I use my own domain name with Shopify? Yes, you can purchase a domain name within Shopify, or use an existing one that you own. We also provide a forever free myshopify.com domain name to all stores when they sign up. Do I get free web hosting when I open an online store? Yes, Shopify

All Shopify plans include unlimited bandwidth for free. POS What is Shopify POS? Shopify POS is a point of sale app that you can use to sell your products in person. Yes, your Shopify online store automatically synchronizes with Shopify POS, and you manage your entire business from one dashboard.
